input:
Triage the log file at: ../../services/ingestion/loghub-samples/HDFS/HDFS_2k.log

Use read_log_chunk to read the first 100 lines and get an initial picture. Use grep to find all ERROR, WARN, and FATAL entries. Use cluster_errors to group anomalies into time windows. Then produce a triage report with exactly these sections:

## Severity
## Root Cause Hypothesis
## Suggested Actions
